formulas.throughput_first: first historical throughput_mbps ordered by elapsed_seconds
formulas.throughput_last: last historical throughput_mbps ordered by elapsed_seconds
formulas.throughput_slope: least-squares slope of throughput_mbps against real elapsed_seconds
formulas.lookback_duration_seconds: configured historical lookback, fixed at 600 seconds
formulas.proportion_below_low: fraction of historical measurements below 1.35 Mbps
formulas.proportion_below_medium: fraction of historical measurements below 3.375 Mbps
formulas.proportion_below_high: fraction of historical measurements below 6.75 Mbps

target.name: target_code
target.definition: downgrade_needed when the strictly future 600-second horizon contains rebuffering, a quality decrease, p25 throughput below the current profile capacity, or more than 30% of future samples below that capacity.

offline_usage.policy: Build each example exclusively from the 600-second historical window.
